caption: The video captures a scene from a soccer stadium where players and staff are seated on the red stands, likely during a break or before the start of a match. The individuals are wearing blue jerseys with some in green shorts, indicating they might be part of the same team. They appear to be engaging in various activities; some are sitting and resting, while others are standing and walking around. A few people are seen wearing masks, suggesting health precautions are being observed. The atmosphere seems relaxed, with players chatting and preparing for the upcoming game. The presence of security personnel and officials in suits adds to the formal setting of the event.
